title: golden_hour_balcony
prompts: A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Selfie shot from slightly above on a Parisian apartment balcony with ornate iron railing, wearing a cream silk robe loosely tied at the waist with golden hour light warming the silk to a deep honey tone, leaning on the railing with one hand while holding the phone up with the other, hair caught mid-breeze across her face, wistful half-smile, a small espresso cup and a worn paperback sit on the railing ledge behind her, long amber shadows stretch across the stone floor, backlit hair glowing like a halo.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Medium shot taken by a friend on a NYC fire escape, wearing an oversized men's white button-down mostly unbuttoned with a lace bralette visible underneath, golden light streaming between buildings catching the thin cotton fabric making it almost translucent at the edges, sitting on the metal grating with knees drawn up and a ceramic coffee mug cradled in both hands, sleepy satisfied morning face with eyes half-open, a folded blanket and potted succulent beside her, warm amber lens flare cutting across the frame.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Wide selfie on a Mediterranean villa terrace draped in fuchsia bougainvillea, wearing a linen sundress with thin straps fully backlit so the silhouette of her body shows through the fabric, standing back against the white stucco wall with one foot propped up and head tilted back into the sun, eyes-closed sun worship expression, one hand loosely holding a glass of white wine catching the light, terracotta pots and trailing vines frame the edges, luminous golden skin.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Candid friend shot on a modern high-rise balcony with floor-to-ceiling glass panels, wearing a sage silk camisole and matching sleep shorts with lace trim glowing warm in the sunset light, stretching in the open doorframe with arms raised and fingers brushing the frame, soft laugh frozen mid-moment as the wind catches her hair, a phone resting on the glass railing and string lights not yet lit draped along the top edge, the city skyline bathed in pink and gold behind her.
